mnemonics: Issue Tracker: I.T. - Identify, Track, Iterate
Passing Data Using Properties: P.D.U.P. - Properties Do Universal Passing
Passing Data Using Children: P.D.U.C. - Properties Do Universal Children Passing
Dynamic Composition: D.C. - Dynamic Components Only Once
keyPoints: React Classes are used for complex components
Composing Components are used to combine smaller components into one component
Issue Tracker is used to identify and track bugs in the code
Properties are used to pass data from one component to another
Children are used to pass data from one component to another
Dynamic Composition is a technique to compose components only once
